title: Furlough
doc_html:
§1667.11. Furlough

            Furlough of an individual due to a state of emergency declared by a federal, state, parish, or municipal official shall not affect the individual's eligibility to receive additional pay out of state funds as provided in this Part.

            Acts 2022, No. 637, §1.
doc_text:
§1667.11.  Furlough
Furlough of an individual due to a state of emergency declared by a federal, state,
parish, or municipal official shall not affect the individual's eligibility to receive additional
pay out of state funds as provided in this Part.
Acts 2022, No. 637, §1.
